content:
Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

**Caption:** What $5 gets you in Tokyo Japan 🇯🇵 the egg in the end is dericious 😍 #Tokyo #Japan #Food #Gyoza #antoninjapan #lifeinjapan

**JSON:**

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Tokyo",
    "full_address": "Tokyo, Japan",
    "order": 1
  },
  {
    "name": "Japan",
    "full_address": "Japan",
    "order": 2
  }
]
```

I hope this is helpful!

**No se encontraron ubicaciones en el texto proporcionado.**

El texto solo menciona el nombre de un lugar, "Tokio", pero no proporciona una dirección completa.
